pages.text:
AMBASSADE DE MALTE

NOTE VERBALE

The Embassy of thy Republic of Malta presents its compliments to the

Ministry of Foreign Affairs and has the honour to announce that the

Government of Malta is hereby expressing its intention of adhering to the

Convention relating to international Exhibitions of 22 November 1928 and to the Protocols of 16 November 1966 and 30 November 1972 and to the

Amendments of 24 June 1982 and 31 May 1988.

The Embassy of the Republic of Malta avails itself of this opportunity to convey to the Ministry of Foreign Affairs the renewed assurance of its highest consideration.

Paris, the 19 day of August 1999

BASSY

OF|MA,

Ministère des Affaires Etrangères 37, Quai d'Orsay 75007 Paris

PARIS

92, AVENUE DES CHAMPS ÉLYSÉES, 75008 PARIS

- TÉL.: 01 56 59 7590 - FAX : 0145 62 00 36
